blended.narrative: Loveland is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 8" over the past week. Current depth: 42".
